Metadata.CommitMsg:
fix: ZAP DAST scan working (62 pass, 0 fail), fix schemathesis --url flag

- ZAP: use zaproxy/zap-stable image, mount /zap/wrk volume for reports,
  target frontend on internal Docker network (not publicly exposed)
- Schemathesis: fix --base-url to --url flag (API change in newer version)
- ZAP results: 62 checks passed, 5 minor warnings (server version header,
  CSP unsafe-inline, missing COEP header), 0 failures

Security scan: 33 passed, 0 failed, 2 skipped (TLS, WAF).
